array.string: launchctl setenv AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK "$(security find-generic-password -w -s aws-bedrock -a aws-bedrock)" launchctl setenv DEVREV_API_KEY "$(security find-generic-password -w -s devrev -a devrev)" launchctl setenv CIRCLECI_TOKEN "$(security find-generic-password -w -s circleci -a circleci)"
